en: Do you know how to use this English word Attendance
ko: 이 영어 단어 어떻게 쓰는지 알아? Attendance

en: It's a noun that means the number of people who go to an event or are present at a place
ko: 행사에 참석하거나 어떤 장소에 있는 사람 수를 뜻하는 명사야

en: Here's an example The attendance The attendance
The attendance was incredible The attendance was incredible Over
ko: 참석자 수가 놀라웠어. 참석자 수가 놀라웠어.

en: 300 people turned up I'm worried our permits and insurance don't cover that
ko: 300명 넘게 왔어. 허가증이랑 보험이 그 인원을 커버하는지 걱정돼

en: attendance Let's review Say this out loud
The attendance was incredible The attendance was incredible
ko: 참석자 수가 놀라웠어. 참석자 수가 놀라웠어
